name: Ocal Browser V3.7.50beta: The Professional Update
body:
### 🚀 Ocal Browser V3.7.50beta: The Professional Update

This release introduces the professional version of Ocal Browser, featuring dedicated PDF handling and elite browsing capabilities.

#### 📄 Professional PDF Handling
- **Dedicated PDF Icon**: Introduced a sleek, professional-grade icon for PDF files associated with Ocal Browser on Windows.
- **Registry Integration**: Seamless integration with Windows Explorer for a premium document viewing experience.

#### 🛡️ Neural Shield Core
- **Advanced Ad-Blocking**: Integrated the latest filter paradigms for an ad-free experience.
- **Stealth Browsing**: Improved tracker blocking and fingerprint protection.

#### 🎥 Media Integration
- **Enhanced YouTube Support**: Native integration for dislike restoration and ad-neutralization.
- **Smart Media Agent**: Improved PiP and downloading logic.

#### ⚙️ Technical Update
- **Version 3.7.50 Core**: Stabilized the underlying hardware acceleration and window management.
